/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcompressible_embeddings.so -o libcompressible_embeddings.so CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/compressible/compressible_partition_config.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/compressible/res_quant/res_quant_dataset.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/compressible/res_quant/res_quant_dataset_densify.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/manager/emb_dataset_manager.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/manager/emb_dataset_manager_cache.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/resident/resident_emb_dataset.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/resident/resident_emb_dataset_densify.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/resident/resident_partition_config.cu.o CMakeFiles/compressible_embeddings.dir/src/working/working_emb_dataset.cu.o  /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib64/librt.a -lcublas -lgomp -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
